description: Configure automatic monthly amortization for a prepaid insurance premium in Northwind Traders. Create two new accounts: 'Prepaid Insurance' (Assets group) and 'Insurance Expense' (Expenses group). Set up a recurring monthly journal entry named 'Monthly Insurance Amortization' for 1000 that debits 'Insurance Expense' and credits 'Prepaid Insurance'. Ensure the entry is saved and active.
